name: 夜間酒吧/KTV包廂
description: 生日派對場景打破校園的純真氛圍，酒精、昏暗燈光和社交壓力製造了曖昧空間，使未遂之吻和情感試探成為可能。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: We'll celebrate Ryan's birthday in room 888 this evening. / Andrea, you finally came. Come here. Have fun. / I am Tipsy. / Were you trying to kiss me? / Then will you give me the chance? / Nope. Only my boyfriend can kiss me.
examples.context: 生日派對場景打破校園的純真氛圍，酒精、昏暗燈光和社交壓力製造了曖昧空間，使未遂之吻和情感試探成為可能。
